network_summary: Two Chicagoland GP locations operating under the Heartland Dental national DSO platform, using the Illinois friendly-PC wrapper 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' Both are already classified dso_national/Heartland Dental. AO Cassandra Petersen is a Patterson Dental Customer Integration Coordinator — an administrative/credentialing contact, not a dental owner. The AO co-appearance is a false-positive network signal; the real network is Heartland Dental (KKR-backed PE since 2018). Consumer brands: Complete Dental of Frankfort (Frankfort) and Premier Dental Center (Naperville).
owner_operator_identity: Heartland Dental LLC (DSO platform, KKR PE-backed). Cassandra Petersen is a Patterson Dental admin/credentialing contact appearing as NPPES authorized official — not a dental owner.

Shared authorized official CASSANDRA PETERSEN across both NPIs (reach=2, ZIPs 60423 and 60563)
Patterson Dental Customer Integration Coordinator LinkedIn profile matches AO name — admin/credentialing contact, not owner

Both DB rows already carry entity_classification=dso_national, affiliated_dso=Heartland Dental
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Heartland Dental LLC is a national DSO platform, KKR (PE) majority investor since 2018. Official site: https://heartland.com/about-us/. 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' is Heartland's documented Illinois friendly-PC per CLAUDE.md and NPPES brand-mining evidence from 2026-05-30.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: AO cluster is a BILLING/ADMIN FALSE POSITIVE: Cassandra Petersen is a Customer Integration Coordinator at Patterson Dental (dental supplier), not a dental owner or officer. Her appearance as shared AO on two Heartland-affiliated NPIs reflects Patterson Dental's credentialing/administrative role, not personal multi-office ownership. The real network is Heartland Dental — both locations are already correctly classified dso_national.
evidence_chain: AO signal: CASSANDRA PETERSEN listed as authorized official on two NPPES org-NPIs (1134624307 Frankfort 60423, 1003316035 Naperville 60563), both under 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' → Web search found LinkedIn profile for Cassandra Petersen as 'Customer Integration Coordinator' at Patterson Dental (dental supply company, Mattoon IL), confirming she is an admin/credentialing contact, not a dental owner → Both addresses confirmed to serve Heartland Dental-supported consumer-brand offices (Complete Dental of Frankfort, Premier Dental Center) → Heartland Dental corporate DSO platform, KKR PE-backed since 2018, confirmed at heartland.com → Both DB rows already correctly classified dso_national/Heartland Dental.
future_app_notes: No reclassification needed — both are already dso_national/Heartland Dental. Flag for AO false-positive suppression: Patterson Dental admin contacts (like Cassandra Petersen) frequently appear as NPPES authorized officials across Heartland-supported practices; future AO-cluster scans should consider suppressing Patterson Dental employee AO co-appearances as non-owner. The consumer brands (Complete Dental of Frankfort, Premier Dental Center) could be added to the brand_trade_names index for Heartland Dental if that table is maintained.
